summary: Backend verification of Flag Tournament mode. Verified: create room accepts mode field, state returns mode, flags_only forces category=capitals and timeout_ms=6000, classic keeps category=defender/attacker and timeout_ms=12000, default mode=classic. Flag images (flagcdn.com) are drawn from image_questions pool at ~25% probability (4/15 sampled duels had img URL); remaining 75% were text-only capitals questions from QUESTIONS['capitals'].
passed: GET /api/rooms/{code}/state returns mode field (flags_only and classic)
15/15 flags_only attacks produced duel.category=='capitals' regardless of attacker/defender category (sports, history)
Classic mode attack: category is attacker's (sports) since target was empty cell, timeout_ms=12000
Sample flag img URLs matched https://flagcdn.com/w320/*.png format

failed.issue: Only ~25% of flags_only duels served flag-image questions from IMAGE_QUESTIONS['capitals']; the other 75% were plain-text capitals questions from QUESTIONS['capitals'] (no img). Spec says 'all questions from capitals (flags) only' which may imply 100% flag-image questions.
failed.evidence: Sampled 15 duels: with_img=4, text_only=11. get_random_question() uses 25% probability path for IMAGE_QUESTIONS before falling back to text QUESTIONS.

action_items: Clarify intent: if flags_only mode should serve ONLY flag-image questions (100%), update get_random_question() or /rooms/attack to force image-only pool when mode=='flags_only' (e.g., always pick from IMAGE_QUESTIONS['capitals']). Otherwise current behavior is acceptable.

success_rate.backend: 100% for stated acceptance criteria (mode field, category forcing, timeout); design nuance noted separately
